Get involved

Join Tech Club

We welcome students of all skill levels and majors. Whether you're a seasoned developer or just starting out, Tech Club has something for you. Fill out the form and we'll be in touch!

📅
Weekly Meetings
Every Thursday at 6:00 PM in the Engineering Building
🛠️
Project Teams
Join an existing project or pitch your own idea
🎓
No Experience Required
We provide workshops and mentorship for all skill levels
✉️
Stay in the Loop
Get updates on events, workshops, and opportunities
